User Story: As a visitor I want a persistent nav so I can move between pages
Expected Behavior: Nav fixed at top, logo left, links and CTA right on desktop, becomes glass on scroll
How To Test: Load page and scroll; check header stays pinned and gains border/blur
Evidence: Nav renders in static HTML; not animation gated

User Story: As a visitor I want the current page highlighted
Expected Behavior: Active route link is bone color, others dimmed
How To Test: Visit each route and inspect highlighted link
Evidence: usePathname driven, renders client side
Notes: Works on desktop md+ where links show

User Story: As a mobile visitor I want a menu to reach all pages
Expected Behavior: Tapping hamburger opens panel with links and CTA; tapping a link closes it
How To Test: Resize to 390 wide; tap menu icon
Evidence: Toggle is useState; markup present
Notes: Menu hidden md+; shown below md

User Story: As a visitor I want to immediately see who Execution Labs is
Expected Behavior: Eyebrow, H1, paragraph, CTAs, and stat row visible on load
How To Test: Load / and confirm hero text shows without scrolling
Evidence: Built HTML had opacity:0 on every hero block; visible only if Framer Motion JS fired
Error Found: Hero content server-rendered at opacity:0 via motion initial state; blank hero when JS/whileInView did not run
Fix Applied: Removed Framer Motion from Hero; replaced motion divs with CSS .reveal class that rests at opacity:1
Notes: grep 'We build systems' present, 0 opacity:0 in out/index.html

User Story: As a visitor I want clear primary and secondary actions
Expected Behavior: Start a project links to /contact; See work links to /work
Evidence: ButtonLink renders anchors/links in HTML

User Story: As a visitor I want a product-feeling visual proving capability
Expected Behavior: 6 panels (queue, workflow, time saved, status, brief, build) all visible with content
How To Test: Load / and inspect the dashboard card
Evidence: Panels rendered at opacity:0; bar charts at height:0px/width:0px
Error Found: Panel motion wrappers and bar growth animations gated all dashboard content on JS
Fix Applied: Converted Panel to plain div with .reveal; bars use static inline sizes; flow line uses CSS animation
Notes: height:40%/96% and width:74%/92% now in HTML; 0 opacity:0

User Story: As a visitor I want a lively metric
Expected Behavior: Number shows 1284 and counts up when in view
How To Test: Load / and watch Time saved value
Evidence: CountUp started at 0 and required useInView to ever show a value
Error Found: If observer/JS did not fire the metric stayed 0
Fix Applied: CountUp now defaults state to final value; animates from 0 only when JS, in view, and motion allowed

User Story: As a visitor I want subtle live motion
Expected Behavior: Active queue row cycles every ~2.2s
How To Test: Load / and watch queue highlight move
Evidence: List items render regardless; only highlight is stateful
Fix Applied: Kept useState rotation; list always visible

User Story: As a visitor I want tactile buttons
Expected Behavior: Primary bone, secondary outline; subtle hover, no bounce
Evidence: CSS transitions only

User Story: As a visitor I want to see the offering
Expected Behavior: Four rows (AI Agents, Internal Tools, MVP Software, Product Systems) visible with tags
How To Test: Scroll to What we build section
Evidence: Rows wrapped in Reveal with opacity:0 initial; blank when whileInView did not fire
Fix Applied: Reveal rewritten as CSS-only, rests visible

User Story: As a visitor I want reasons to trust
Expected Behavior: Three cards (vision, fast, real systems) visible
Evidence: Reveal opacity:0 gated cards

User Story: As a visitor I want to browse selected work
Expected Behavior: 5 work cards in a horizontal scroll track, drag or arrows
How To Test: Scroll to Selected work; use arrows and swipe
Evidence: Carousel track wrapped in Reveal opacity:0; blank carousel
Error Found: whileInView reveal gated the whole track
Fix Applied: CSS reveal fix; track always visible
Notes: 5 client names present in static HTML

User Story: As a visitor I want buttons to scroll the carousel
Expected Behavior: Prev/Next scroll the track smoothly
Evidence: scrollBy ref logic intact

User Story: As a visitor I want each card to show client, metrics, tags
Expected Behavior: Category, year, preview, client, summary, 3 metrics, tags
Evidence: WorkCard is static markup
Error Found: Was hidden only by parent Reveal

User Story: As a visitor I want to reach the full work page
Expected Behavior: Link navigates to /work
Evidence: ButtonLink to /work

User Story: As a visitor I want to understand the process
Expected Behavior: Four steps (Brief, Map, Build, Improve) visible with connecting line on lg
Evidence: Reveal opacity:0 gated steps

User Story: As a visitor I want a final prompt to start
Expected Behavior: Heading 'Have a system worth building?' and Start a project button visible
Evidence: Reveal opacity:0 gated the CTA card
Notes: CTA heading present in static HTML

User Story: As a visitor I want footer info at the bottom
Expected Behavior: Footer with logo, blurb, page links, X link, email, copyright; appears after page content
Evidence: Footer was static but appeared high because main content collapsed to ~0 height when sections were opacity:0/zero-size
Error Found: Footer looked like it preceded content because hidden sections took little vertical space
Fix Applied: Content now occupies real height so footer sits below it
Notes: Footer order correct now that sections render

User Story: As a visitor I want detailed case studies
Expected Behavior: 5 alternating rows with problem/built/result and card
Evidence: Each row wrapped in Reveal opacity:0
Error Found: whileInView reveal gated all case studies

User Story: As a visitor I want a page title and intro
Expected Behavior: Eyebrow, H1, intro paragraph visible on load
Evidence: Reveal opacity:0 gated hero text

User Story: As a visitor I want to submit a project brief
Expected Behavior: Name, email, company, message fields plus submit visible
Evidence: Form motion had initial opacity:0; also page Reveal wrappers gated content
Error Found: Form and surrounding content gated on JS
Fix Applied: Form initial set to opacity:1; Reveal rewritten as CSS

User Story: As a visitor I want to pick a project type
Expected Behavior: Selecting a chip highlights it; one active at a time
Evidence: Chip uses useState; markup present

User Story: As a visitor I want to pick a budget band
Expected Behavior: Selecting a budget chip highlights it
Evidence: Chip useState

User Story: As a visitor I want confirmation after sending
Expected Behavior: Submitting shows Brief received with Send another option
Evidence: AnimatePresence success view; content not blank since it only shows after submit
Fix Applied: Left AnimatePresence intact (does not gate default content)

User Story: As a visitor I want to reach social
Expected Behavior: Footer X link opens x.com in new tab
Evidence: anchor target _blank rel noopener

User Story: As a visitor I want to email directly
Expected Behavior: mailto link opens mail client
Evidence: mailto anchor present

User Story: As a visitor on any device I want a correct layout
Expected Behavior: Single column mobile, multi-column on lg; no clipped content
Evidence: Layout used responsive grids; the failure was hidden content not layout
Error Found: Content was invisible across all viewports due to reveal gating
Fix Applied: CSS reveal fix makes content visible on every viewport
Notes: Verified content in static HTML; layout grids unchanged

User Story: As a visitor I want subtle motion that never hides content
Expected Behavior: Content visible by default; reveal-up plays as enhancement; respects reduced motion
How To Test: Load with JS on, JS off, and reduced motion
Evidence: Framer Motion whileInView/initial opacity:0 controlled whether content appeared
Fix Applied: Moved to CSS keyframes inside prefers-reduced-motion:no-preference; resting state visible

User Story: As an operator I want a static build
Expected Behavior: next build with output export produces /out with all routes
Evidence: Build succeeds; 6 static pages generated

User Story: As a visitor I want no sideways scroll
Expected Behavior: Page width fits viewport; only the work carousel scrolls horizontally by design
How To Test: Check body scrollWidth at each viewport
Evidence: Containers use max-w and px; carousel isolated with overflow-x-auto
Notes: Carousel overflow is intentional and contained

User Story: As a visitor I want no giant empty areas
Expected Behavior: Every section is filled with visible content
Evidence: Sections collapsed/blank due to opacity:0 and zero-size charts
Error Found: Reveal and chart animations left empty containers
Fix Applied: CSS reveal and static chart sizes
Notes: All sections render content in static HTML

User Story: As a visitor I want all content reachable
Expected Behavior: No content permanently hidden by animation state
How To Test: Disable JS and load all routes
Evidence: All animated content hidden without JS
Fix Applied: Resting state visible; JS not required to see content
Notes: Static HTML now contains all content

User Story: As a visitor I want a graceful 404
Expected Behavior: Unknown route serves Next not-found page
Evidence: Default Next 404 generated in export

User Story: As a visitor I want animated flow lines
Expected Behavior: Base nodes/paths always visible; highlight flows along edges
Evidence: Base SVG paths/circles were always static; only moving highlight was motion
Notes: Static paths visible; flow animates via CSS

User Story: As an operator I want a clean build
Expected Behavior: npm run lint and npm run build both pass
Evidence: Both commands succeed after fixes
Notes: Lint clean; build compiles and exports
